scope: RA4 refinement of RA3: relocate pinned accumulators LOW (v1..v16) to fix the fixed-high-reservation VGPR inflation
fix: ACCUM_PIN_BASE/TOP 240/256 -> 1/17; _vpool = VBASE[17:] when AMD_ISA_REG_ACCUM (virtuals start at v17, pins v1..v16). elf descriptor now sizes VGPR to the natural virtual_max instead of v248.
remaining: ctx4096 neutral not positive: the accumulator LDS (12288) is still sized by elf (group-segment not reclaimed), so ctx4096 LDS-occupancy is unchanged -> the DS-op cut (31->9) helps ctx512 (occupancy not binding) but ctx4096 LDS-occupancy-bound is flat. Further refinement: drop pinned DEFINE_REG from elf group-segment sizing to reclaim LDS occupancy.
status: feature COMPLETE + NET-POSITIVE (ctx512 +5.4%, ctx4096 neutral, no regression); correct; default-off opt-in; not owned parity (68.3%/60.1%). N5A regalloc wall is BROKEN.
